description: Customer-pilot deploy for APS Pty Ltd. Operator-side workspaces (mbp-private, xcp-platform, xlooop, x-biz, x-docs, x-front) are EXCLUDED at build time per tenant_filter rules. APS sees only its own workspace.

data_files.rationale: Workspace switcher · APS deploy sees only its own workspaces
Workspace operational detail · APS workspaces only
Operations dashboard rollup · APS rows only
Project data · APS workspace projects only
Server-side per-tenant policy · APS tenant entries only
Customer-safe export manifest · APS customer only
Customer-health value read-model · APS customer only
Member directory · APS deploy seeds Andrey + Dominic as customer-side members (currently empty in operator bundle post R50-Tail-7; APS tenant manifest re-populates them as authority candidates)

Generic nav UI config (wsPanes + projectModes), no tenant data. The customer bundle's index.html also runs DataLoader, which reads it into window.WS_PANES/PROJECT_MODES; without it the customer app would hit the same authenticated-render crash.

_passthrough_note: src/ (worker source) is DELIBERATELY NOT passed through to this CUSTOMER bundle: a static Cloudflare Pages site serves dist/ + data/ + index.html and never executes worker source. Shipping src/ verbatim would expose operator construction IP (lens engine, detector-config seed SQL, cockpit chat-bridge) into a customer bundle. Enforced by scripts/verify-tenant-source-isolation.mjs (HR-PLATFORM-VS-INSTANCE-1, F1-exposure).

customer_redaction._comment: Operator-identity/IP scrub applied to EVERY data_files[] output (customer tenants only — operator-mbp has no such block so its projection is untouched). Closes the 2026-06-14 envelope-leak class: keep_only_* shallow-copies the top-level envelope, passing operator owner_graph / approved_by / governance source_paths through to the customer bundle.

metadata.operator_authority: Andrey Petrushko (APS authority candidate); operator-side reference Marat
metadata.login_path: Andrey logs in at aps.xlooop.com (his designated path per R50-Tail-7 audit doc)
